CAUSE CALLED FOR TRIAL, DEPT. 210, JUDGE THOMAS J MELLON JR CLERK NICOLE OLCOMENDY, CSR JUNE LEATHLEY. ATTY BRIAN ROSALES FOR PLTF, NO APPEARANCE BY DEFT. HAVING CONSIDERED THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED BY PLTF, THE COURT AWARDS JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF THE PLTF AGAINST DEFT PHILLIP MASON, FOR POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES AT 1455 LASALLE ST, #118, SF, CA AND UNLAWFUL DETAINER DAMAGES FROM JAN 30, 2001 THROUGH JUNE 1, JUNE 1, 2001 AT THE RATE OF #3.63 PER DAY. EXHIBITS ARE WITHDRAWN. PLTF'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
